notes: 'insyaallah' on appointment confirmation — non-committal soft-yes that hedges against unforeseen events. 'jam tujuh' = 7 o'clock (Indonesian uses jam + hour). VERIFY WITH GIRLFRIEND: whether 'insyaallah' in this context reads as a real maybe (might not show) vs. a polite yes (will show unless something catastrophic happens) for your relationship register.
